_sources.rpp: BEA Regional Price Parities by MSA (MARPP dataset, all items, index US=100), 2024 vintage. Downloaded from official BEA file: https://apps.bea.gov/regional/zip/MARPP.zip (landing page: https://www.bea.gov/data/prices-inflation/regional-price-parities-state-and-metro-area)
_sources.fmr2br: HUD FY2026 Fair Market Rents, 2-bedroom, from official HUD USER file: https://www.huduser.gov/portal/datasets/fmr/fmr2026/FY26_FMRs_revised.xlsx (landing page: https://www.huduser.gov/portal/datasets/fmr.html)
_sources.unemployment: BLS LAUS metro data. bls.gov blocks automated fetch (HTTP 403), so rates are taken from search snippets of BLS pages or official state/local workforce releases citing BLS; noted per metro.
_sources.vamc: va.gov facility pages via web search.

fmr2br.areaName: Washington-Arlington-Alexandria, DC-VA-MD HUD Metro FMR Area

unemployment.note: From BLS Mid-Atlantic MSA table snippet (labor force 3,436,200 / unemployed 133,600, not seasonally adjusted). DC-MD Metropolitan Division alone was 5.2% in May 2026 per DC DOES release citing BLS (https://does.dc.gov/release/washington-metro%E2%80%99s-unemployment-rate-52-percent-0). bls.gov resisted direct fetch.

vamc.name: Washington VA Medical Center (VA Washington DC health care)

metros.notes: Full-service VAMC at 50 Irving St NW. Federal workforce contraction in 2025-26 pushed the DC-MD division unemployment rate up (~5.2%); the wider MSA rate remains lower (3.9%).

fmr2br.areaName: Virginia Beach-Norfolk-Newport News, VA-NC HUD Metro FMR Area

unemployment.note: Value via USAFacts snippet of BLS LAUS data (https://usafacts.org/answers/what-is-the-unemployment-rate/metro-area/virginia-beach-va/), April 2026; bls.gov resisted automated fetch. Regional context: rate rose to ~4.1% in Nov 2025 on federal job cuts before easing.

vamc.name: Hampton VA Medical Center (VA Hampton health care)

metros.notes: Hampton VAMC (100 Emancipation Dr, Hampton) is a 432-bed teaching facility serving eastern VA and northeastern NC — full VAMC access for the metro.

fmr2br.areaName: Minneapolis-St. Paul-Bloomington, MN-WI HUD Metro FMR Area

unemployment.note: Value via search snippet of BLS LAUS data as republished by FRED series MINN427URN (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/MINN427URN); bls.gov and FRED resisted automated fetch.

vamc.name: Minneapolis VA Medical Center (Minneapolis VA Health Care System)

metros.notes: Full VAMC (1 Veterans Dr, Minneapolis) with 24/7 emergency department; VISN 23 flagship affiliated with the University of Minnesota.
